name: Vermont Maple Syrup Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine maple syrup, corn syrup and cream in a 2-quart heavy saucepan.
2. Place over low heat and stir constantly until the mixture begins to boil.
3. Continue cooking without stirring to the soft ball stage (236°F).
4. Remove from heat; cool to lukewarm (110°F) without stirring or beating.
5. Beat with an electric mixer on low speed until the candy loses its gloss and thickens (this takes quite a while).
6. Stir in vanilla and nuts.
7. Pour into a lightly buttered 8-inch loaf pan.
8. When cool, cut into about 1 pound of fudge.
